content:
# Swishy AI Motion Templates - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: motion design reference, AI generated UI, landing page animation, social preview, product demo
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

Visual traits:
- AI motion design
- template gallery
- kinetic typography
- social-ready animation
- microinteraction prompts

Use when:
- motion design reference
- AI generated UI
- landing page animation
- social preview
- product demo

Avoid when:
- serious data entry
- high-frequency workflow
- accessibility-critical flow
- print/static export

AI summary: Use Swishy as an optional motion-pattern reference for kinetic typography, notifications, website reveals, data viz motion, mockup animations, social cards, and launch/demo sequences. Store motion intent, not copied assets.

# Swishy AI Motion Templates - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: motion design reference, AI generated UI, landing page animation, social preview, product demo
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Treat Swishy as a motion-pattern source, not as a static visual design system.
- Extract reusable animation intent: timing, entrance direction, reveal type, bounce/spring feel, and hierarchy.
- Keep implementation original and adapted to the product UI rather than copying template output.

AI summary: Use Swishy as an optional motion-pattern reference for kinetic typography, notifications, website reveals, data viz motion, mockup animations, social cards, and launch/demo sequences. Store motion intent, not copied assets.

# Swishy AI Motion Templates - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: motion design reference, AI generated UI, landing page animation, social preview, product demo
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Avoid motion that blocks reading or repeats endlessly without value.
- Respect reduced-motion preferences for large reveals, parallax, and spring effects.
- Do not use motion alone to communicate critical status.

AI summary: Use Swishy as an optional motion-pattern reference for kinetic typography, notifications, website reveals, data viz motion, mockup animations, social cards, and launch/demo sequences. Store motion intent, not copied assets.

# Swishy AI Motion Templates - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: motion design reference, AI generated UI, landing page animation, social preview, product demo
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Use this source when a UI needs polish through motion: hero reveal, notification stack, typewriter text, animated metrics, or product demo sequences.
- Translate templates into motion specs: duration, delay, easing, stagger, transform, opacity, blur, and spring behavior.
- For app UI, prefer short 150-450ms microinteractions; reserve longer 800-1600ms sequences for hero or video-style presentation.

AI summary: Use Swishy as an optional motion-pattern reference for kinetic typography, notifications, website reveals, data viz motion, mockup animations, social cards, and launch/demo sequences. Store motion intent, not copied assets.
